title: How to Create a Client Pitch With AI — From Prompt to PDF in 15 Minutes
summary: A video tutorial shows how to generate a professional one-pager marketing document from a single text prompt using Venngage AI. The workflow covers content generation, design, copy editing, visual asset selection, and PDF export, completing the full process in 15 minutes.
writeup: The tutorial demonstrates building a professional one-page marketing document from a single text prompt using Venngage AI, completing the full process in 15 minutes. The workflow moves through content generation, design, copy editing, visual asset selection, and PDF export. It illustrates a prompt-to-document pipeline for producing a client pitch without manual layout work.
